message.content:
Review the "Event Horizon: Proximity-Based Docking in Rocket Mode" feature across these 5 files for bugs, logic errors, and race conditions. This is review pass 12 — previous passes found and fixed 23 bugs. Focus on finding NEW bugs not yet fixed. Be rigorous but avoid false positives — only report bugs with genuine functional impact at confidence >= 80%.

Files to review:
1. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useRocketMode.js`
2. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\RocketLayer.jsx`
3. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\RocketHUD.jsx`
4. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.jsx`
5. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.module.css`

Previously fixed bugs (DO NOT re-report):
1-5: Memory leak, double rAF, callback overwrite, zero stageSize, infinite rAF
6-10: Infinite redirect, star position, stale callback exit, stale dockState, sessionStorage throws
11-15: Asymmetric stageSize, auto-dock null after restore, null after ENTER dock, can't dock in magnet, warp timing
16-18: Flash overlay Phase 2, inconsistent RNG, unstable rocketMode ref
19-21: Restore timeout cleanup, explore timeout cleanup, surprise auto-dock cooldown
22: Missing cooldown in magnet→approaching transition
23: Blanket preventDefault on all keys during docking

If no bugs found at ≥80% confidence, say "NO BUGS FOUND".

content.text: I'll read all 5 files in parallel to begin the review.
